arts.ttl: Where UEFA ranks Celtic compared to Liverpool and Man City in new report on best-supported teams in Europe
arts.sum: In a UEFA report called The European Club Talent and Competition Landscape, Celtic was one of only 16 clubs in Europe to break through the 1m aggregated attendance mark last season. And to prove it, a report from UEFA has highlighted Celtic as one of the best-supported clubs in Europe.

arts.ttl: Celtic transfer collapse revealed by goalkeeper as the ONE decision for Bratislava pinpointed – Parkhead bulletin
arts.sum: The Hoops return to Champions League action under the lights at Parkhead on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Celtic players respond brilliantly after Tomoki Iwata post celebrates first goal for new club
arts.sum: On the social media platform, Iwata took a moment to dedicate the goal to his son, who turned two a couple of days ago, while thanking Birmingham fans for their support on the night. Tomoki Iwata left Celtic during the summer despite being a likeable presence in the engine room during his 18 months at the club.

arts.ttl: Trevor Carson on Celtic transfer near miss as boss' quit threat killed deal
arts.sum: Aberdeen goalkeeper Joe Lewis picked up an injury that day and that prompted them to go in for Newcastle's Freddie Woodman on loan, trumping Well who thought they were getting the Englishman to replace Carson. Freddie was getting ready to come up and Joe Lewis gets injured at Aberdeen training that day, this was the day before the window shuts.

arts.ttl: Christopher Jullien now reveals how everybody at Celtic felt about Jota before he left
arts.sum: As Jota looks to kickstart his career in France with Stade Rennais, former Celtic defender, Christopher Jullien has shared how people at Celtic felt about him before he left for Saudi Arabia. And the former Hoops defender has shared how people at Celtic felt about the winger before he made his record-breaking Saudi transfer.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers echoes Rodri 'concern' amid increased football schedule involving Celtic
arts.sum: Every football player loves to play, they love to train, but they want to produce quality and be able to be at their best as often as they can be, so it’s a natural concern, I totally get it.” Amid their involvement in the Champions League, 67 Hail Hail has extensively covered the potential for squad rotation at Celtic to manage the volume of matches Brendan Rodgers will have to contend with.

arts.ttl: Rodgers confident 'small details' won't cost Celtic in Champions League
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has rubbished the "narrative" around Slovan Bratislava, insisting they are expecting a tough Champions League opener.

arts.ttl: What Birmingham City fans are saying about former Celtic midfielder Tomoki Iwata after his debut vs Wrexham
arts.sum: Former Celtic midfielder, Tomoki Iwata, is drawing all the plaudits after he made his debut for Birmingham City last night. Birmingham City fans buzzing with ex-Celtic midfielder

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers names what Celtic's Champions League target REALLY is as he makes 'readiness' confession
arts.sum: The Parkhead boss can't wait to square up against Slovan Bratislava under the lights in Glasgow's east end

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers pinpoints Celtic Champions League narrative people will 'cry' about
arts.sum: For the past fee years, the Hoops have been handed very tricky groups and been outsiders for virtually every match, with their final points totals and placings reflecting that. Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Celtic WhatsApp community today.
